lyrics.text: <Wellerman>
There once was a ship that put to sea
and the name of the ship was the billy of tea
lyrics.translation: 她的名字叫“运茶比利号”

lyrics.text: The winds blew harder bowed it down
below my bully boy's blow
lyrics.translation: 吹吧，海上的霸王，你吹吧！

lyrics.text: Soon may the Wellerman come
lyrics.translation: 很快威勒曼号就要来了

lyrics.text: to bring us sugar and tea and rum
lyrics.translation: 给我们带来糖，茶叶和朗姆酒

lyrics.text: One day when the tonguin is done
lyrics.translation: 当有一天我们补给耗尽了

lyrics.text: we'll take our leave and go
She'd not been two weeks from shore
lyrics.translation: 她离岸还不到两个星期

lyrics.text: went down on her a right whale bore
lyrics.translation: 有一只露脊鲸向她冲来

lyrics.text: The captain called all hands and swore
He'd take that whale in tow
lyrics.translation: 他要抓到它并把它绑在船体上

lyrics.text: Soon may the Wellerman come
lyrics.translation: 很快威勒曼号就要来了

lyrics.text: To bring us sugar and tea and rum
lyrics.translation: 给我们带来糖，茶叶和朗姆酒

lyrics.text: One day, when the tonguin' is done
lyrics.translation: 当有一天我们补给耗尽了

lyrics.text: We'll take our leave and go
<Drunken Sailor>
What will we do with a drunken sailor
lyrics.translation: 我们拿喝醉的水手怎么办

lyrics.text: What will we do with a drunken sailor
lyrics.translation: 我们拿喝醉的水手怎么办

lyrics.text: What will we do with a drunken sailor
lyrics.translation: 我们拿喝醉的水手怎么办

lyrics.text: Early in the morning!
Put him in the brick until he's sober
lyrics.translation: 把他扔到双桅帆船上直到他醒过来

lyrics.text: Put him in the brick until he's sober
lyrics.translation: 把他扔到双桅帆船上直到他醒过来

lyrics.text: Put him in the brick until he's sober
lyrics.translation: 把他扔到双桅帆船上直到他醒过来

lyrics.text: Early in the morning!
Way hay and up she rises
Way hay and up she rises
Way hay and up she rises
Early in the morning!
<Leave Her Johnny Leave Her>
Oh the wind was foul and the sea ran high
Leave her johnny leave her
lyrics.translation: 离开她吧，强尼，离开那艘旧船吧！

lyrics.text: she shipped it green and none went by
lyrics.translation: 船已锈迹斑驳，也没有人愿意经过她

lyrics.text: and it's time for us to leave her
Leave her, Johnny, leave her
lyrics.translation: 离开她吧，强尼，离开那艘旧船吧！

lyrics.text: Oh, leave her, Johnny, leave her
lyrics.translation: 哦～离开她吧，强尼，离开那艘旧船吧！

lyrics.text: For the voyage is long and the winds don't blow
lyrics.translation: 航路还长，风儿也不吹了～

lyrics.text: And it's time for us to leave her
lyrics.translation: 是时候离开那艘旧船啦！

lyrics.text: <Cape Cod girls>
Cape Cod ships ain't got no sails
lyrics.translation: 鳕鱼岬的船儿还没升帆

lyrics.text: Haul away, haul away!
They'd all blown off in the Northeast gales
And we're bound away for Australia!
lyrics.translation: 驾一叶轻舟我们去澳大利亚！

lyrics.text: So heave her up my bully, bully boys
lyrics.translation: 起锚吧，健壮的小伙子们

lyrics.text: Haul away, haul away!
Oh heave her up and don't you make a noise
lyrics.translation: 哦～升起帆的动作可真麻利

lyrics.text: And we're bound away for Australia!
lyrics.translation: 驾一叶轻舟我们去澳大利亚！

lyrics.text: <Santiana>
Oh Santiana gained the day
lyrics.translation: 圣迪亚诺号跑得可真快

lyrics.text: Away Santianna
Now pull the yan up the west they say
Along the plains of Mexico
Well heave her up and away we'll go
Away Santiana
Heave her up and away we'll go
Along the plains of Mexico
She's a fast clipper ship and a bully good crew
lyrics.translation: 她是最好的快帆船还有最好的船员

lyrics.text: Away Santiana
And an old salty Yank for a captain too
Along the plains of Mexico
Well heave her up and away we'll go
Away Santiana
Heave her up and away we'll go
Along the plains of Mexico
Santiana fought for gold
lyrics.translation: 圣迪亚诺号是来找金矿的

lyrics.text: Away Santiana
Around Cape Horn through the ice and snow
Along the plains of Mexico
Well heave her up and away we'll go
Away Santiana
Heave her up and away we'll go
Along the plains of Mexico
So leave her Jonny off we'll go
The drunken sailor Wellerman whaler found a way for Mexico!
lyrics.translation: 和喝醉的水手还有威勒曼号捕鲸船一起去墨西哥吧！
